case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. SOLOMON WELLS et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SOLOMON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-06-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-04-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-22-2008
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $245.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SOLOMON
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SOLOMON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED FEB-21-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SOLOMON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS, SOLOMON $3,348.39 PRINCIPAL, $346.72 INTEREST, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,940.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SOLOMON
DECLARATION CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
